log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):13+6=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 15] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:13+6=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Hobgoblin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 55/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: Concentrating on Hold Person. Vicious Mockery on Archmage (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:18+6=24 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
